allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'Phase 1: config-driven opportunity scraping pipeline *)

Bash(python -c "from pipeline.config import load_config; c = load_config\(\); print\(len\(c.sources\), 'sources parse OK'\)")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Load API keys from gitignored .env file; add .env.example template *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix Adzuna dedupe and secret hygiene; enable keyed sources *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix broken Adzuna links: keep redirect tokens, refresh URLs on re-scrape *)
Bash(python -c "from pipeline.config import load_config; print\('config OK, career_fair_orgs =', load_config\(\).career_fair_orgs\)")
